fields.name: Reminder Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder terms code this text applies to.

fields.name: Reminder Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reminder level this text applies to.

fields.name: Position
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the text will appear at the beginning or the end of the reminder.

fields.name: Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text that you want to insert in the reminder.
